allow: Bash(cmd.exe /c "where node & where npm & node --version & npm --version")

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Test-Path ''C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\npm.cmd''; Test-Path ''C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\node.exe''; ls ''C:\\Program Files\\nodejs'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select Name")

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Test-Path ''C:\\Program Files\\nodejs''; Test-Path ''C:\\nvm''; Get-ChildItem ''C:\\Users\\chffe\\AppData\\Roaming\\nvm'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select Name")
